query: light leak halation orange red film overexposed analog
message: anti-aesthetic / clarity_and_focus / film_artifacts: light leaks, halation, overexposed film

response.objective_caption: An indistinct image with warm amber and orange tones streaking vertically through the center, a bright white central mass, diagonal red light trails in the lower right, and muted brown, gray, and pink color fields in the surrounding areas.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: A heavily motion-blurred abstract image with intentional streaking and smearing of warm amber, orange, and white light sources through a long exposure, creating vertical and diagonal light trails that dissolve any recognizable subject matter; the frame features a central blown-out white mass, diagonal red light leak-like streaks in the lower right, and a complete loss of fine detail so that brown, gray, and pink surroundings collapse into pure color and gesture with no discernible forms.
